vision_profile.current_state: Meera is a Product Analyst with 6 years of experience, strong in product analytics, SQL, A/B testing, and user research. She currently focuses on post-launch analysis.
vision_profile.main_blocker: Her biggest obstacle is a lack of specific AI product strategy, LLM evaluation, prompt engineering, and technical communication skills with ML teams, leading to a fear of being outcompeted by technical PMs.
vision_profile.vision_12mo: Within 12 months, Meera aims to be actively involved in AI product building, defining AI features, evaluating model capabilities, and leading AI product initiatives, moving beyond post-launch analytics.
vision_profile.top_motivation: She is highly motivated to be an early contributor to AI product development and leverage her analytical background to shape innovative AI solutions.

milestones.identity_statement: Build a robust understanding of AI/ML fundamentals and the unique lifecycle of AI products to confidently step into the AI domain.
